title: I am building a voice note app on monday

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey I use monday for many things and I want to sync my thoughts within monday as well but as you know voice notes are better then writing so I have idea to make an app where you just speak to it and it just saves into monday and organizes it

anyone else interested in using this app?
